heuristic_pessimism_ratio.note: Range reflects n=5 wide CI. Honest claim: 1.5x-7.3x too pessimistic.

production_comparison.caveat: Production seeds IDENTICAL to seed-000 (verified via pickle inspection). Therefore Delta 0.0008 between them is driven by the +1,238 corpus rows added between 2026-05-22 and 2026-05-27, NOT by random-seed variance. This bootstrap measures inter-seed variance on TODAY's corpus only — it cannot cleanly test signal-vs-noise for the cross-corpus comparison.

decision_gate_criterion: For SAME-corpus retrain comparisons: Δ < 1σ (≈ 0.0005) = noise → archive; 1σ < Δ < 2σ = borderline → require multi-seed bootstrap before shipping; Δ > 2σ = signal → ship after refit-dev03-artifacts.sh. For CROSS-corpus comparisons (e.g. retrain on +N rows): need multi-seed bootstrap on BOTH corpora to be statistically clean.
retracted_overclaims: Earlier 'Δ_mean / σ = 1.2σ' was arithmetic error — actual 1.40σ.
Earlier 'production was unlucky seed pick' was wrong — seeds identical.
Earlier 'exactly 4× too pessimistic' was point-estimate only — CI gives 1.5×–7.3×.
Earlier 'ship best-of-5 seed-300' was cherry-picking — violates 5-Gate G2.
